title: Silver Plated Photo Frame Double Book Style Picture Frame Plain Satin Finish and Tarnish Protected for Wedding Picture or Family Photo (7x5)
features: 👑 ELEGANT DESIGN: New to the Fabian Clarke picture frame range, these satin finish silver picture frames offer a touch of elegance in any setting. The timeless design of the frames will sit comfortably in any colour scheme you have in your home.

🎁 THE PERFECT GIFT: These frames make a perfect gift for a loved one. Cherish pictures of special moments such as a wedding, christening, anniversary, birthday or just to pictures of loved ones. Each frame is packed in an elegant box with Fabian Clarke branded tissue paper making it a perfectly giftable item.

🖼️ BACK STAND: All frames come complete with a back stand so they can stand up on a shelf or sideboard. Each frame can be displayed in both portrait and landscape orientation, so it does not matter which way round your photo is.

🧽 EASY TO CLEAN: These frames are finished in an easy to clean satin silver. They are tarnish resistant so will not pick up finger marks etc. To clean them just give them a gentle wipe with a soft, dry cloth.

🦺 SAFETY WINDOW: Each of our frames includes a plexiglass safety window giving your picture the best clarity when on display. If the frame is dropped, the plexiglass will not smash. In order to protect the plexiglass during transit we put a protective film on both sides of it so this needs to be peeled off before you insert your photo.

👍🏻 EASY TO OPEN: These silver-plated frames are backed with a soft black velveteen material adding to the luxurious feel. To open the back of the frame simply open the “easy-slide” tabs on the back and remove the backboard. Inserting or changing your photo requires no tools and can be done effortlessly in seconds.
description: Product Description A message from the founder... Fabian Clarke is a brand brought to you by founder Sarah B. Sarah started designing in 1995 and has had a long and successful career in home interiors. The brand offers simple but stylish photo frames with a focus on quality and form. We try to offer a wide range of common and popular sizes and colours so if you look through our shop you are bound to find something that you like. Thank you for taking the time to read our listing and thanks for supporting a small business. Simple and Elegant Fabian Clarke London offer a wide range of elegant frames in various sizes and colours. They are truly versatile in any design setting and will compliment any room. For a true statement piece in your home, combine various frame sizes together to make an eye catching photo collage. 3 Sizes Available in This Range Our "Plata" range of double silver frames is only available in 3 sizes so it's very easy to pick the right size. They come in 6x4, 7x5 and 8x6. There are no mounts on these frames so you don't need to work anything out. If you have 6x4 phots then buy the 6x4 frame and so on. The photos just lay straight into the back of the frame with no mounting required. Simply slide out the velveteen background, lay your photo inside and slide the back board back on. These double "book style" frames will free stand on any flat surface and you can close them like a book if you want to put them away into storage. Quality Control Packaging Key Features All Fabian Clarke Frames Include: Corner Protectors Bubble Wrapped Protective Film on Window Individually Boxed Quality from Frame to Packaging Protective Film on Window All of our Fabian Clarke London frames come with a protective film on both sides of the window. This helps to protect the window from scratches during transit. The film is so thin and fine that in some cases customers don't actually realise that it's there so please make sure you peel it off from BOTH sides of the acrylic window. You should be able to lift it with a finger nail and peel it back. The finer details... All Fabian Clarke London photo frames are hand packaged ensuring they are received by you in perfect condition. Many other vendors simply shrink wrap their frames and post them like this but they offer no protection. Black Velvet Backed Boards Each Fabian Clarke silver plated picture frame comes with a black plush velveteen back board and stand adding to the elegance of the frame. The board simply slides out of the bottom of the frame making changing a photo very easy. There are no tabs to un-do on this frame. Tarnish Resistant - Easy to Clean The finish on these silver frames is tarnish resistant so they are very easy to keep clean. They have been finished in a special lacquer that makes them hard to pick up fingers marks etc. If you want to clean them just wipe them down with a dry cloth or duster. You can also use furniture polish. The Ideal Frame for Special Memories These silver frames make the perfect place to show pictures of special memories such as weddings, new born babies, christenings or special memories of family and friends. They will add a touch of elegance to your room and fit in with any type of interior finish.
